name: ship-with-ai
description: Ship With AI's full methodology kit as Claude Code skills: autopilot (single-project harness), factory (multi-project org chart via Paperclip), go-live (deploy), launch-day (first-user outreach), night-shift (overnight builds), parallel-build (multi-feature), context-tax (session diagnostic), graveyard (dead-project closeout), collect-feedback (tester pipeline). Companion to the Ship With AI newsletter at shipwithai.substack.com.
